name: Bob's Bourbon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the bourbon, dark brown sugar, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, white vinegar, lemon juice, minced garlic, dry mustard, salt, and pepper.
2. Brush the chicken (either cut-up pieces or boneless breast) with a thin coating of the glaze.
3. Place the chicken on the grill.
4. Continue to baste the chicken while turning it occasionally until cooked through.
